name: Twilio
shortDescription: Comprehensive Twilio integration for SMS messaging, voice calls, and phone number management with secure API key authentication for reliable communication workflows.

actions.name: Send SMS
actions.description: Sends an SMS message to a specified phone number using Twilio's messaging service.

actions.name: Make Voice Call
actions.description: Initiates a voice call to a specified phone number with custom instructions or TwiML.

actions.name: Get Message Details
actions.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific SMS or MMS message.

actions.name: Get Call Details
actions.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific voice call.

actions.name: List Messages
actions.description: Retrieves a list of SMS and MMS messages from your Twilio account with optional filtering.

actions.name: Start Conversation
actions.description: Creates a new conversation and optionally adds participants to it. This combines conversation creation and participant addition into a single operation.

actions.name: Add Conversation Participant (SMS)
actions.description: Adds an SMS participant to an existing conversation. The participant will receive messages via SMS.

actions.name: Add Message to Conversation
actions.description: Adds a new message to an existing conversation.

actions.name: Get Conversation Messages
actions.description: Retrieves a list of messages from a specific conversation.

actions.name: Delete Conversation Message
actions.description: Deletes a specific message from a conversation.

actions.name: List Calls
actions.description: Retrieves a list of voice calls from your Twilio account with optional filtering.

actions.name: List Phone Numbers
actions.description: Retrieves all phone numbers associated with your Twilio account.

actions.name: Get Account Info
actions.description: Retrieves information about your Twilio account including balance and status.

idealUseCases: Automated SMS notification and alert systems
Voice call automation and IVR systems
